name: Loft18 Mandeville
address: 1619 N Causeway Blvd, Frontage Road, Mandeville, LA 70471
about: Loft18 Mandeville is a multi-sport simulator venue that combines high-tech golf and other sports simulations with a full-service sports bar and grill atmosphere. The facility features custom-built Full Swing Golf simulation bays designed for precision play across a variety of games and championship courses, catering to all skill levels. Beyond golf, the venue emphasizes a social, kicked-back environment perfect for networking, casual play, and enjoying gastro-pub fare, craft beer, and cocktails in an all-weather setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing technology for realistic and precise gameplay
All-weather, year-round indoor golf and multi-sport simulations
Combination of high-tech simulators with a social bar and dining experience
Multiple championship games and courses available for play
Kicked-back atmosphere suitable for both focused practice and socializing

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service gastro-pub kitchen with a changing menu of crafted dishes, offering table and patio seat reservations.
Full-service bar with craft beer and cocktails available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built simulation bays featuring precision technology for golf and multi-sport games.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue expects patrons to bring their own clubs, as there is no mention of club rentals on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, Loft18 is a full-service restaurant and bar with its own kitchen and bar service. Outside food and drink are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an exact time for a full 18-hole round, as play duration will vary based on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Loft18 kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as a family-friendly sports bar and grill, making it a suitable environment for children.
